problem id: d864f0fb
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1)

examples:
  11011100 -> 10111001
  00000000 -> 00000000
  11000000 -> 10000001
  11000110 -> 10001101
  00000100 -> 00001000
  11110111 -> 11101111
  00101010 -> 01010100
  00001111 -> 00011110
  10100010 -> 01000101

query: 10010110
predicted answer: 00101101
